title: Gemify
description: Gemify is a Minecraft mod inspired by Steven Universe, inviting the powers and abilities of the gems as a new exciting way of enjoying the game.
body:
Gemify is a Minecraft mod inspired by Steven Universe, inviting the powers and abilities of the gems as a new exciting way of enjoying the game.

This mod is now no longer being developed in favor of the upcoming mod, CobblePals.

Permissions:
You are allowed to use this mod in a modpack, as long as you provide credit.
Steven Universe and all characters, concepts, and elements are trademarks of Cartoon Network.

 

Credits:

Crewniverse and Rebecca Sugar, Cartoon Network, Steven Universe, MCreator
